query:
SELECT 
  f.id,
  f.leadId,
  DATE(f.dataFollowUp) as data_followup,
  f.dataRegistro,
  f.status,
  l.nome
FROM follow_ups f
LEFT JOIN leads l ON f.leadId = l.id
WHERE f.corretorId = 5055943
  AND f.status = 'pendente'
ORDER BY f.dataFollowUp
LIMIT 10;
